utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these sections. Each section also contains the relevant details requested: 
- health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance, includes features, and gives cost details.
- property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance, includes coverage limit, deductible, features, and cost details.
- travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance type, features, and cost details.
- additional_services: lists enhancement services and their inclusion status with cost information.
- total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, savings, and plan activation details.
All items are fully specified with costs and details as required.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main LifeFirst Standard Plan policies: one for physical health, one for mental health, and one for property/contents coverage, plus LifeFirst Standard Plan - Adventure Travel Coverage. From the ground-truth data, these correspond to: (1) LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9, (2) LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 9, (3) LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content with rating 9, and (4) LifeFirst Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 9. Therefore, each selected policy is mapped to its correct rating of 9.
